author: mark
text:
Terminology sweep: 'workspace' -> 'clone' for per-on-disk-checkout

Reverses the bl-1d46 (d8bbf94) terminology call. 'Workspace' overloaded with multi-root tooling (VS Code, Cargo, npm); the XDG-layout pivot (bl-f021, bl-ed32) clarified the two-layer identity (repo by origin URL, clone by path-hash). 'Clone' aligns naturally with git's vocabulary and is unambiguous as a noun.

Renames per the bl-fc50 rules: per-on-disk-checkout 'workspace' -> 'clone'; 'workspace-owned' config (the repo.json layer) -> 'repo-owned'. SPEC-workspace-layout.md renamed to SPEC-clone-layout.md with a new revision-history entry. Cross-document references and code identifiers updated to match (bootstrap_bare_workspace -> bootstrap_bare_clone, workspace_dir -> clone_dir, legacy_workspace/bare_workspace_* test helpers, CLI 'Initialized bare balls workspace' string, 'not a balls workspace' error). Pure rename; no behaviour or schema change.
